# Multiplication → Absolute Square and Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

Main table → Multiplication → Absolute Square and Subtract

Absolute Square and Subtract

Instruction Type and Width                    Instruction description
                                              Performs complex absolute squaring and subtraction. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and Subtract   complex source is 32-bits wide (16-bit real and 16-bit imaginary).
                                              The products are subtracted from the 40-bit destination.
                                              Performs squaring of complex absolute and subtract. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and Subtract
                                              complex source is 64-bits wide (32-bit real and 32-bit imaginary).
Long
                                              The products are subtracted from the 72-bit destination.
                                              Performs complex absolute squaring and subtraction. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and Subtract   complex source is 32-bits wide (16-bit real and 16-bit imaginary).
with Exponent                                 The second source is the exponent. The products are subtracted
                                              from the 40-bit destination.
